text.title: Product Development Trends Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the Product Development Trends methodology end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: collect-candidates
step.action: Enumerate 10-30 candidate trends from analytics, customer interviews, X/HN, filings.

step.name: pull-sources
step.action: For each candidate, pull >=1 source per class (academic, practitioner, market).

step.name: score-four-axes
step.action: Score signal + velocity + alignment + decay 1-5 each.

step.name: verdict-and-kills
step.action: Pick top 2-5 as 'bet' with kill criteria; 5-10 as 'monitor'; remainder 'ignore'.
